subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord! The chosen Lord, the All-Powerful, hath summoned all who dwell upon the earth to the Dayspring of divine lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروردگار حضرت رب مختار جمیع من علی الارض را بمطلع انوار دعوت نمود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
